posts.author: catkins (Crystal Atkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Write email updates at the item level on the mobile app

What are you trying to achieve

We have project managers in the field that would benefit from having the option to “Write update via email” on their iPhones. I can’t find a way around this for them. The Android users have this option.
